task.title: US-001: Introduce a cohesive visual theme and layout rhythm
task.description:
As a user, I want the TUI to feel cohesive and intentional, with consistent borders, emphasis, and spacing. The layout should align panel titles, section spacing, and table header styling for quick scanning.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Centralize styles and apply consistent layout styling | |
| src/cli/tui/mod.rs | modify | Expose new theme helpers if split into module | Optional: new module re-export |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | create | Reusable TUI styles and color palette | Optional file if needed |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Define a small set of reusable styles (title, panel, dim text, accent, selection).
- [ ] Apply the styles consistently to title bar, panels, and table header.
- [ ] Improve panel separation and padding to make the layout feel less cramped.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

impactTable.purpose: Centralize styles and apply consistent layout styling
Expose new theme helpers if split into module
Reusable TUI styles and color palette

commitMetadata.message: LinGet-2sc.1: LinGet-2sc.1 - US-001: Introduce a cohesive visual theme and layout rhythm
commitMetadata.fullMessage:
LinGet-2sc.1: LinGet-2sc.1 - US-001: Introduce a cohesive visual theme and layout rhythm

- Created src/cli/tui/theme.rs with centralized style definitions
- Added palette submodule with RGB color constants
- Defined 20+ reusable style functions for consistent TUI styling
- Applied styles to title bar, panels, table headers, and status bar
- Improved panel separation (sources panel: 20→22 chars)

Ralph-Task: LinGet-2sc.1

task.title: US-001: Restructure main layout with details panel
task.description:
As a user, I want a persistent details panel so I can scan package info without extra keystrokes. The main layout should show sources, packages, and details in clear columns.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Split main layout into sources/packages/details columns | |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | modify | Add any new panel styles if needed | Optional |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Main content splits into three columns: Sources (left), Packages (center), Details (right).
- [ ] Column widths feel balanced on typical terminal widths (80–140 cols).
- [ ] Details panel is visible in normal mode and respects active panel highlighting rules.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

impactTable.purpose: Split main layout into sources/packages/details columns
Add any new panel styles if needed

commitMetadata.message: LinGet-nge.1: feat: Restructure main layout with details panel
commitMetadata.fullMessage:
LinGet-nge.1: feat: Restructure main layout with details panel

- Add Details panel to ActivePanel enum for three-column layout
- Update Tab navigation to cycle through Sources -> Packages -> Details
- Modify main content layout with balanced column widths (20/30/25)
- Add draw_details_panel showing package name, version, status, source,
  description, size, homepage, license, maintainer, install date, and
  dependencies

Ralph-Task: LinGet-nge.1

task.title: US-005: Add update-all action in TUI
task.description:
As a user, I want an Update All option so I can apply all available updates with one action.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Handle update-all keybinding and confirmation flow | |
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Expose key hint and messaging for update-all | |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A new keybinding triggers Update All with a confirmation prompt.
- [ ] Update All runs updates for all packages with updates available.
- [ ] Status/console messaging indicates progress and completion.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

impactTable.purpose: Handle update-all keybinding and confirmation flow
Expose key hint and messaging for update-all

commitMetadata.message: LinGet-nge.5: LinGet-nge.5 - US-005: Add update-all action in TUI
commitMetadata.fullMessage:
LinGet-nge.5: LinGet-nge.5 - US-005: Add update-all action in TUI

- Added 'U' keybinding for Update All with confirmation prompt
- Update All runs updates for all packages with updates available
- Status messages show progress and completion results
- Commands bar shows 'U' hint when updates are available

Ralph-Task: LinGet-nge.5

task.title: US-003: Add console view for recent status/output
task.description:
As a user, I want a console panel to see recent status messages and action output so I understand what the TUI is doing.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Store a rolling buffer of console messages | |
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Render console panel in layout | |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | modify | Add styles for console text if needed | Optional |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Console panel shows the most recent status/actions (install/remove/refresh).
- [ ] Buffer is capped (e.g., last 100 lines) to avoid unbounded growth.
- [ ] Console panel is readable and does not obscure status bar.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

impactTable.purpose: Store a rolling buffer of console messages
Render console panel in layout
Add styles for console text if needed

commitMetadata.message: LinGet-nge.3: LinGet-nge.3 - US-003: Add console view for recent status/output
commitMetadata.fullMessage:
LinGet-nge.3: LinGet-nge.3 - US-003: Add console view for recent status/output

- Added rolling console buffer (max 100 lines) to App struct
- Added push_console_message method to store status/actions
- Added console panel to TUI layout (between main content and commands bar)
- Console displays install/remove/refresh/search actions and results
- Added console_text style to theme.rs

Ralph-Task: LinGet-nge.3

task.title: US-002: Populate package details panel
task.description:
As a user, I want the details panel to show key metadata for the selected package so I don’t need to press Enter to inspect it.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Render package details content | |
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Add helpers for selected package fields if needed | Optional |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Details panel shows name, source, status, installed version, and available version when present.
- [ ] Description text is shown and truncated or wrapped intentionally.
- [ ] When no package is available (loading or empty), panel shows an appropriate empty state.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

impactTable.purpose: Render package details content
Add helpers for selected package fields if needed

commitMetadata.message: LinGet-nge.2: LinGet-nge.2 - US-002: Populate package details panel
commitMetadata.fullMessage:
LinGet-nge.2: LinGet-nge.2 - US-002: Populate package details panel

- Add Details panel to TUI layout showing package metadata
- Display name, source, status, version, and description
- Handle empty states (loading, no package selected)
- Add wrap_text helper for description wrapping
- Add label style for field labels
- Update navigation to cycle through Sources, Packages, Details panels
- Update help text and Enter key behavior

Ralph-Task: LinGet-nge.2
